title: Unintrusive Armor v2
description: This texturepack changes the armor models to cover your skin as little as possible.
body:
A complete remake of my original unintrusive armor pack (uploaded to PMC), updated to the latest version of the game.

# Quick info!

This texturepack changes the armor models to cover your skin as little as possible, and does so while maintaining full compatibility with armor trims.

This pack is fully compatible with my [Slim Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/slim-armor) pack, feel free to try them together!

There isn't much else to say, so please take a look at the image gallery. I'll let the pictures talk for me.
